summary: Life Sciences / Clinical Trials insurance covering pharmaceutical companies, biotech firms, and CROs for product liability, clinical trial indemnity, and recall costs. Highly regulated under MHRA/EMA. Complex per-trial and per-participant exposure structures.

schemaEntities.description: Clinical trial entity. Custom: ISRCTN_Ref, EudraCT_Number, Phase, TherapeuticArea, ParticipantCount, SponsorOrganisation, CRO_Name, IMP_Name, IND_Application, MHRA_CTAuth_Date, EC_ApprovalDate, InclusionCriteria_Risk, CountriesOfTrial.

115 rules: MHRA/EMA CTA validity checks, Phase I/II/III/IV risk scoring, gene therapy and ATMP special conditions, first-in-human protocol triggers, participant count limit adequacy, therapeutic area exclusion list.
Product entity. Custom: ActiveIngredient, ATC_Code, MarketingAuthorisationStatus, RecallRiskScore, GMP_CertificateDate, QP_Name, BatchRecallCapability, DistributionReach.

relationships.note: Trial phase and participant count drive per-participant limit adequacy -- 13 custom fields
Product liability driven by ATC code and marketing authorisation status
MHRA CTA date and Phase I FIH rules are hard underwriting stops

migrationIssues.detail: ClinicalTrial_LS has 13 custom fields with MHRA/EudraCT registry references. No GW Cloud standard clinical trial entity -- complete new entity design required.
MHRA CTA and EudraCT registry validation required at bind. No GW Cloud native MHRA integration -- new regulatory API connector required.
Clinical trial phase-specific risk scoring and limit requirements. Custom Gosu algorithm -- GW Cloud rating rules can accommodate with significant configuration.
Advanced Therapy Medicinal Products require special underwriting conditions. Custom Gosu conditions -- specialist underwriting referral workflow required in GW Cloud.

cloudMapping.action: MHRA CTA registry validation API integration required
EudraCT/CTIS registry integration required for EU trials
TypeKey migration required -- Phase I/II/III/IV classification
WHO ATC classification code field -- therapeutic area exclusion list migration required
